topic: When a government inspection reveals what a manual HR system has been missing
format: Walk through a day-in-the-life of an HR team managing this manually — show every broken step in sequence
post: The Ministry of Labour inspector arrives at 9am unannounced.  Your HR manager is already sweating — not because anything is wrong, but because proving it's right will take the rest of the day.  She pulls out three binders. Starts cross-referencing handwritten leave records with a spreadsheet that
